folio.label: 105v
folio.l: To wryte of ©ow , a storie of swicú meruaille
As of Grisilde , pacient and kynde

note.notetxt: 12Off-set paraph in red in the gutter.ODR

folio.l: Lest Chechiuache , ©ow swelwe , in hire entraille
¢ Folwetú Ekko , that holdetú noon silence
But euäe answeretú , at the counter taille
Betú nat be daffed , for ©oure Innocence
But sharply taketú on ©ow , the gouänaille
Emprentetú wel , this lesson , in ©oure mynde
For comune profyt , sithe it may a vaille
¢ ñe Archewyues , stondetú ay at defence
Syn ©e ben stronge , as is a gret Camaille
Ne suffretú nat , that men ©ow do oxxenceoffenceoxxffence 21This is a correction: double check the sequence.ODR
And sklendre wyues , feble as in bataille
Betú egre , as a Tigre is be ©onde in Inde
Ay clappetú as a Mille , I ©ow counsaille
¢ Ne drede hem nat , dotú hem no reuäence
For thougú thyn husbonde , armed be in maille
The arwes of thyn crabbed , eloquence
Shal perse his brest , and eke his auentaille
In ielousye , I rede eke thow hiö bynde
And æè shalt make hi~ couche , as dotú a quaille
¢ If thow be fair , there folk ben in presence
Shewe thow thy vysage , and thyn apparaille
If thow be foule , be free of thyn dispence
To gete the frendes , ay do thyn trauaille
Be ay of chere as ligút , as lef on lynde
And late hi~ care , wepe , wrynge , and waille
